# ManifestURL.ItemsItem

**Object**

An array of dictionaries representing what the manifest installs.

## Declaration

```swift
object ManifestURL.ItemsItem
```

## Objects

- **ManifestURL.ItemsItem.AssetsItem**: An array of dictionaries that describe an item to install.
- **ManifestURL.ItemsItem.Metadata**: The metadata for an application or package manifest item.

items.description: An array of dictionaries that describe an item to install.

items.description: The metadata for an application or package manifest item.
